# Enso Labs
> Enterprise AI consulting firm, agentic systems studio, and financial AI agent lab in New York City.

## About
Enso Labs is a principal-led enterprise AI consulting firm founded by Sav Banerjee in New York City. We deliver AI transformation consulting, agentic AI development, cloud managed services, and AI advertising strategy for Healthcare, Finance, Advertising, and B2B Technology — then build the production systems that deliver it.

## Services
- Enterprise AI Transformation Consulting (https://ensolabs.ai/services)
- Agentic AI Consulting & AI Agent Development (https://ensolabs.ai/services/agentic-ai-consulting)
- Claude Managed Services & Cloud AI (https://ensolabs.ai/services/claude-managed-services)
- Financial AI & Agentic Trading Systems
- Healthcare AI & Pharma Compliance (https://ensolabs.ai/industries/healthcare)
- AI Advertising & Marketing Automation

## Products
- signal2noise (https://signals.ensolabs.ai): Daily AI intelligence
- Enso Trading Terminal (https://ensolabs.ai/work/trading-terminal): Autonomous financial AI agents

## Case Studies
- https://ensolabs.ai/work/gore — AI Market Intelligence Platform
- https://ensolabs.ai/work/heller — AI Center of Excellence
- https://ensolabs.ai/work/trading-terminal — Autonomous Trading
- https://ensolabs.ai/work/enterprise-ai — Enterprise AI Programs
